status: STUB — pipeline and market data unavailable

blockers.detail: agents/src/trader/ does not exist. The repo only ships agents/src/firefly/ (Firefly orbital data center mission planner). The trader CLI (trader scan, trader research) has not been implemented yet.
blockers.action_required: Build agents/src/trader/ with orchestrator, schemas, CLI, and yfinance_client per the daily-trader routine spec.

blockers.detail: The remote execution environment's outbound proxy blocks CONNECT tunnels to fc.yahoo.com:443 (policy denial, HTTP 403). pip install yfinance succeeded but all Ticker.history() calls fail with 'curl: (56) CONNECT tunnel failed, response 403'. Market data cannot be fetched in this environment without either (a) a self-hosted market data API accessible through the proxy or (b) an allowlist exception for Yahoo Finance.
blockers.proxy_log: ts: 2026-07-02T23:09:35.942Z kind: connect_rejected detail: gateway answered 403 to CONNECT host: fc.yahoo.com:443
blockers.action_required: Either add Yahoo Finance to the proxy allowlist, or integrate an alternative data source (Alpha Vantage, Polygon.io, Quandl) accessible through the proxy.

blockers.detail: Without the trader CLI and market data, no LLM scan (trader scan --tickers ... --window 7) could be executed. The Anthropic backend is available in this environment (anthropic package installed) but has no entry point wired up.
blockers.action_required: Implement agents/src/trader/cli.py with trader scan command.

backtest.status: skipped — no prior recommendations to test (first run)

reranked_tiers.note: Cannot rank without scan data. Watchlist order preserved from core defaults.

fom_formula.normalization: each component normalized to [0, 1] across the watchlist universe
fom_formula.confidence: LLM thesis confidence score from trader scan (0-1)
fom_formula.normalized_sizing_sigma: position-sizing signal from trader scan, normalized to [0,1] across watchlist
fom_formula.recent_hit_rate: rolling 5-day hit rate from backtest module
fom_formula.news_momentum: news_scout sentiment score (0-1), 0 if no news surfaced
